Title: Access Settings from Homepage
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the settings page.

Title: View New Location from Homepage
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Expected Result: User is directed to the Pathfinder page.

Title: Navigate Back from Pathfinder Page
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the homepage.

Title: Display Question on Pathfinder Page
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page and did not click "Indietro".
Expected Result: A question is shown to the user.

Title: Handle Available Suggestion on Pathfinder Page
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page, a question is displayed, and a suggestion is available.
Test Steps:
1. System checks if a suggestion is available.
2. System displays the suggestion.
Expected Result: A suggestion is shown to the user.

Title: Handle No Suggestion on Pathfinder Page
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page, a question is displayed, and no suggestion is available.
Test Steps:
1. System checks if a suggestion is available.
2. System does not display any suggestion.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the homepage without any suggestion.

Title: Navigate to Map from Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the map page.

Title: Open Yelp in Browser from Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Expected Result: Yelp site opens in the browser.

Title: Initiate Call from Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Expected Result: A call to the business is initiated.

Title: Return to Homepage from Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the homepage.

Title: Modify Preferences from Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. User modifies preferences.
2. User navigates to the map page.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the map page after modifying preferences.

Title: Modify Preferences and Open Yelp from Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. User modifies preferences.
2. User navigates to the Yelp page.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the Yelp page after modifying preferences.

Title: Modify Preferences and Initiate Call from Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. User modifies preferences.
2. User initiates a call to the business.
Expected Result: A call to the business is initiated after modifying preferences.

Title: Modify Preferences and Return to Homepage from Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. User modifies preferences.
2. User returns to the homepage.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the homepage after modifying preferences.

Title: Swipe Right from New Location Selection
Preconditions: User is on the homepage and selected "Visualizzazione nuovo luogo".
Expected Result: Behavior undefined in the diagram, assume no action taken.

Title: Negative Scenario - Invalid Input on Pathfinder Page
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Expected Result: Error message displayed, suggesting valid input.

Title: Edge Case - Multiple Suggestions on Pathfinder Page
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page and multiple suggestions are available.
Test Steps:
1. System checks for multiple suggestions.
2. System displays all suggestions.
Expected Result: All suggestions are shown to the user.

Title: Negative Scenario - Network Issue on Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page and network connection is lost.
Test Steps: 1. User attempts to navigate to the map page.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating network issue.

Title: Edge Case - Preference Modification Without Navigation
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page and modifies preferences.
Test Data: Preferences modified but no navigation performed.
Expected Result: Preferences saved without redirecting to any page.

Title: Negative Scenario - Invalid Click on Homepage
Preconditions: User is on the homepage and clicks an invalid option.
Expected Result: Error message displayed, suggesting valid actions.

Title: Edge Case - Quick Successive Actions on Pathfinder Page
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page and performs quick successive actions.
Test Steps: 1. User quickly clicks "Indietro" followed by "Visualizzazione nuovo luogo".
Expected Result: System handles quick successive actions gracefully, ensuring correct redirection.

Title: Negative Scenario - Invalid Action on Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page and clicks an invalid action.
Expected Result: Error message displayed, suggesting valid actions.

Title: Edge Case - Preference Modification with Network Delay
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page, modifies preferences, and experiences network delay.
Test Steps:
1. User modifies preferences.
2. System experiences network delay.
Expected Result: Preferences saved after network delay, with appropriate feedback to the user.

Title: Negative Scenario - Invalid Swipe on Homepage
Preconditions: User is on the homepage and swipes an invalid direction.
Expected Result: Error message displayed, suggesting valid swipe directions.

Title: Edge Case - Quick Successive Suggestions on Pathfinder Page
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page and receives quick successive suggestions.
Expected Result: System handles quick successive suggestions gracefully, displaying the latest suggestion.

Title: Negative Scenario - Invalid URL on Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page and clicks "Open in Browser" with an invalid URL.
Test Steps: 1. User clicks "Open in Browser" with an invalid URL.
Expected Result: Error message displayed, suggesting valid URLs.

Title: Edge Case - Preference Modification with User Logout
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page, modifies preferences, and logs out.
Test Steps:
1. User modifies preferences.
2. User logs out.
Expected Result: Preferences saved before logging out, with appropriate feedback to the user.

Title: Negative Scenario - Invalid Click on Settings Page
Preconditions: User is on the settings page and clicks an invalid option.
Expected Result: Error message displayed, suggesting valid actions.

Title: Edge Case - Quick Successive Questions on Pathfinder Page
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page and receives quick successive questions.
Expected Result: System handles quick successive questions gracefully, displaying the latest question.

Title: Negative Scenario - Invalid Call Number on Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page and clicks "Call Business" with an invalid number.
Test Steps: 1. User clicks "Call Business" with an invalid number.
Expected Result: Error message displayed, suggesting valid phone numbers.

Title: Edge Case - Preference Modification with Application Crash
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page, modifies preferences, and the application crashes.
Expected Result: Preferences saved before crash, with appropriate feedback to the user upon restart.

Title: Negative Scenario - Invalid Swipe on Settings Page
Preconditions: User is on the settings page and swipes an invalid direction.
Expected Result: Error message displayed, suggesting valid swipe directions.

Title: Edge Case - Quick Successive Suggestions and Questions on Pathfinder Page
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page and receives quick successive suggestions and questions.
Test Steps: 1. System receives quick successive suggestions and questions.
Expected Result: System handles quick successive suggestions and questions gracefully, displaying the latest suggestion and question.

Title: Negative Scenario - Invalid Map Navigation on Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page and clicks "Navigate" with an invalid destination.
Test Steps: 1. User clicks "Navigate" with an invalid destination.
Expected Result: Error message displayed, suggesting valid destinations.
